# WYSIWYG

WYSIWYG editor component.

### Features

- TinyMCE-based editing
- theme-aware styling

### Configuration & Usage

Use the component where rich text editing is needed inside the Enso ecosystem.

### Contributions

are welcome. Pull requests are great, but issues are good too.
